name: plan-keeper
description: Four skills for organizing markdown plans in ~/plans/<repo>/. plan-save captures plans from conversation; plan-do routes a plan to the right next skill; plan-done archives a completed plan into ~/plans/<repo>/done/ with a frontmatter completion stamp; plan-push files the plan as a Linear or Jira ticket and writes the ticket reference into the plan's frontmatter for re-push. Backed by a bundled plan_keeper_cli.py that handles I/O, naming, atomic-write mutation, per-repo config (~/plans/<repo>/.plankeeper.json) for Linear/Jira credentials and defaults, and the network calls to Linear GraphQL / Jira REST. Includes a PreToolUse hook that auto-approves invocations of the bundled CLI.
